topStories.description: Israel's president was forced to take cover as a missile struck nearby shortly after he gave a press conference.

topStories.title: What Trump said about Iran after postponing military strikes
topStories.description: After announcing the US will postpone strikes on Iran’s power plants, Donald Trump said Iran called him to make a deal.

topStories.title: Anil Ambani bank fraud case: Supreme Court says CBI, ED showed reluctance
topStories.description: Solicitor General Tushar Mehta promises to personally convey the court’s message to ED and CBI directors in “harsher terms”

topStories.title: Tehran residents express distrust over Trump’s war diplomacy
topStories.description: “If we trust him, we lose.”

topStories.title: ‘Stop, stop, stop’: Moment Air Canada plane crashes into truck
topStories.description: CCTV video captured the moment an Air Canada plane collided with a fire truck at New York’s LaGuardia Airport.

topStories.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
topStories.description: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.

topStories.title: A pharmacist and a homesick lifestyle blogger: The 'alarming' civilian cost of war in Iran
topStories.description: The toll on civilians is mounting fast as the US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

topStories.title: "I Messed Up": Moment Plane Crashed Into Truck On New York Runway
topStories.description: A pilot and a co-pilot were killed after an Air Canada Express passenger plane collided with a fire truck on a LaGuardia Airport runway late Sunday.

topStories.title: Iran denies any talks with US after Trump claims ‘productive’ discussions
topStories.description: Iran parliament speaker says US president using idea of talks to 'escape quagmire in which US and Israel are trapped'.

topStories.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
topStories.description: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new relief program.

topStories.title: Trump can declare victory in Iran – and he should
topStories.description: The US president has proven that hitting hard and fast rather than engaging in endless negotiations guarantees victory.

topStories.title: 'Like the plane got cut in half': Eyewitnesses describe chaos of LaGuardia crash
topStories.description: Eyewitnesses have described the moment Air Canada flight AC8646 crashed into a fire truck on the runway of New York's LaGuardia airport.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court unhappy over CBI, ED ‘reluctance’ against Anil Ambani firms, calls for ‘fair, dispassionate’ investigation
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court today called on the CBI and ED to conduct a “fair, dispassionate, transparent, and time-bound” investigation into a banking fraud linked to the Anil Dhirubhai Ambani Group. The apex court also directed concerned financial institutions to “render full cooperation”.

dailyNews.title: EAM Jaishankar speaks with US' secretary Rubio on West Asia conflict
dailyNews.description: Jaishankar and Rubio discussed West Asia conflict and its impact on the global economy, with a focus on energy security concerns

dailyNews.title: JFK, Atlanta airports issue travel advisory amid TSA worker shortage; passengers can expect five-hour wait time
dailyNews.description: Two of the US' busiest airports issued a travel advisory on Monday, warning passengers that the wait time could be at least five hours as TSA workers resign amid a partial DHS shutdown. Atlanta Airport, the world's busiest, saw wait time stretching beyond three hours over the weekend.

dailyNews.title: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s  ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
dailyNews.description: There is expected to be pushback from Israel following President Donald Trump’s move towards de-escalation with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Joe Kent praises Trump, says ‘President working to get peace with Iran, Israel will be against it, but…’
dailyNews.description: Kent, who is also former counterterrorism official in the Trump administration, said the President was working to make peace with Iran, while once again acknowledging resistance from Israel.

dailyNews.title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
dailyNews.description: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Messed Up’: Harrowing Final Moments in Fatal LaGuardia Crash
dailyNews.description: Air-traffic controllers were helping a fire truck’s crew navigate a rain-slicked tarmac at New York’s LaGuardia before midnight on Sunday when panic suddenly set in.

dailyNews.title: Iran Parliament speaker denies talks with US after Trump claims ‘major points of agreement’
dailyNews.description: The statement directly contradicts claims made by Donald Trump, who earlier said Washington had engaged in talks with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: California cemetery removes banner draped over 9/11 memorial advertising new Islamic section after backlash
dailyNews.description: A California cemetery removed a banner advertising an Islamic memorial garden after it was draped over a 9/11 memorial, sparking community backlash.

dailyNews.title: Underperforming California school district paying enormous sum to teach kids with a 'rap curriculum'
dailyNews.description: The DOJ says race-based programming is 'troubling' after a California school district signed a $270,000 deal with rap curriculum group School Yard Rap.

dailyNews.title: Alito gives lawyers plain-English lesson on meaning of 'day' as Supreme Court weighs late-ballot fight
dailyNews.description: Justice Samuel Alito emphasized the literal meaning of the word “day" as the Supreme Court heard arguments Monday about whether states can legally accept late-arriving ballots that are postmarked by Election Day.

dailyNews.title: Chicago lawmaker ripped over 'disgusting' response to college student allegedly killed by illegal immigrant
dailyNews.description: Chicago Alderwoman Maria Hadden faces fierce backlash after suggesting slain Loyola student Sheridan Gorman was in the wrong place at the wrong time.

topStories.title: Veteran CBS reporter joins far-left media company MeidasTouch as anchor, says they share same 'north star'
topStories.description: Ex-CBS News reporter Scott MacFarlane announced on Monday that he is joining far-left MeidasTouch, which is openly hostile to President Donald Trump.

topStories.title: Pritzker breaks silence on migrant charged in student’s murder, blames Trump for ‘politicizing’ case
topStories.description: Illinois governor responds days after Loyola freshman’s killing, deflects to Trump while sidestepping questions on immigration enforcement

topStories.title: Trump turns 2020 statue wars on their head with Columbus monument revival
topStories.description: A 13-foot Christopher Columbus replica now stands on White House grounds, replacing the monument rioters tossed into Baltimore's Inner Harbor in 2020.

dailyNews.title: Trump turns 2020 statue wars on their head with Columbus monument revival
dailyNews.description: A 13-foot Christopher Columbus replica now stands on White House grounds, replacing the monument rioters tossed into Baltimore's Inner Harbor in 2020.

dailyNews.title: 'I'll kill him': Convicted man back in custody after threatening Trump, then demanding pardon
dailyNews.description: Oregon man Diedrich Holgate was re-arrested after allegedly texting threats to kill President Trump to his probation officer.

dailyNews.title: Top TSA watchdog backs Trump’s ICE airport move as shutdown snarls travel
dailyNews.description: As the DHS shutdown enters its 37th day, GOP Rep. Carlos Gimenez says Trump’s plan to use ICE agents at airports will "speed up the process" for frustrated American travelers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure Is Already Battered
dailyNews.description: U.S. and Israeli attacks on power plants and other civilian infrastructure risk escalating the conflict across the region, and angering Iranians who oppose the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Pay $1 Billion to Energy Giant to Cancel Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: In exchange, the French company TotalEnergies would invest in oil and natural gas projects in Texas and elsewhere.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Digging Up Washington. Can Lawsuits Stop the Bulldozers?
dailyNews.description: As the president develops plans to fundamentally alter the White House, the Kennedy Center and other sites, federal lawsuits are beginning to catch up.

dailyNews.title: ICE agents spotted in airports across the country in plan to assist TSA
dailyNews.description: ICE agents have been spotted in airports across the nation after President Donald Trump announced they would be deployed to assist TSA. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports on the morning rush at Atlanta’s Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport and how ICE agents are helping.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel would be 'very happy' if U.S. reaches ceasefire deal with Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump told reporters he believed Israel would abide by a ceasefire agreement negotiated between the United States and Iran. The president also discussed the decision to hold off on strikes on a power plant as talks between the nations were ongoing.

dailyNews.title: Conservation groups sue to block Trump efforts to 'hastily gut' the Kennedy Center
dailyNews.description: Several conservation groups sued Monday to block the planned massive renovations at the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, arguing the Trump administration plans to "hastily gut" the center without regard to its history or statutory guardrails

dailyNews.title: Trump rejects off-ramp to fund DHS as airport delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune discussed an off-ramp with President Donald Trump to reopen TSA and end long lines at airports, funding DHS but not ICE. Trump rejected it.

dailyNews.title: Rubio to testify in trial of former roommate accused of secretly lobbying for Venezuela
dailyNews.description: The federal trial of a former Miami congressman accused of secretly lobbying for Venezuela’s government during the first Trump administration begins Monday with Secretary of State Marco Rubio set to testify over his interactions with his old friend.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration says it is ready to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has asked a federal judge to dissolve her order preventing ICE from deporting Kilmar Abrego Garcia to Liberia.

dailyNews.title: Examining Iran's capabilities as Trump delays ultimatum for Strait of Hormuz reopening
dailyNews.description: As the war with Iran enters its fourth week, President Trump says he's holding off on his threat to destroy the country's power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News national security analyst Aaron MacLean joins with more.
